name: Orla Mining Ltd.
description: Orla Mining Ltd. is a Canadian gold producer operating the Camino Rojo Oxide Gold Mine in Zacatecas, Mexico, and the Musselwhite underground gold mine in Ontario, Canada, acquired from Newmont in February 2025. The company produced over 300,000 ounces of gold in 2025 and is also advancing the South Railroad development project in Nevada, USA, and the Cerro Quema project in Panama.
